action.description: The committee on EDN recommend that the measure be PASSED, WITH AMENDMENTS. The votes were as follows: 6 Ayes: Representative(s) Woodson, La Chica, Amato, Evslin, Kapela, Olds; Ayes with reservations: none;  Noes: none; and 4 Excused: Representative(s) Garrett, Kila, Muraoka, Souza.
